description.section:
RATIONALE/AIM

Addressing the lack of comprehensive intelligence critical to [strategic] state building activities. Activities in relation to defence & security, trade, energy & water, strictly public tenant residences, infrastructure, and more.

EXPECT

Understanding the structural problems that impede a State's development & progress - and designing effective, flexible, scalable solutions thereof - requires intelligence; intelligence vis-à-vis strengths, weaknesses, potentials, etc.

Therefore, expect in time measures & metrics, continuous evaluation, root cause modelling & analysis, diagnostic modelling & analysis, predictive modelling & analysis, and much more. In general, modelling & analysis via mathematical techniques, e.g., machine Learning | artificial intelligence, signal processing, probability, statistics, operations research, graph networks, etc.
